title: Observability, SLOs, Drift, Incidents, and Recovery · Program Brief: Rag Quality Drift Detection
summary: A RAG endpoint records total latency and full prompts, cannot distinguish retrieval from generation failure, and notices stale results only after users complain. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the quality drift detection increment in redacted stage trace and reliability dashboard. Learners progress through…
objectives: Monitor corpus, query, language, embedding, score, filter, feedback, answerability, citation, latency, and cost drift with labeled confirmation.
Keep query and content capture disabled or tightly governed and bound labels, exemplars, hashes, sampling, retention, and cardinality.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-observability-reliability-4
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-observability-reliability-4.
# Case 1655: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def worked_rag_observability_reliability_4(trace_stages: int = 6, expected_stages: int = 6, retrieval_p95_ms: float = 42.0, error_rate: float = 0.01, content_logged: bool = False, rollback_ready: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "corpusworked4",
        "query4dekrow",
        "tenant1655",
        "indexworked41655",
        "prompt4dekrow1655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if trace_stages != expected_stages or expected_stages < 5:
        return False, trace_stages, "trace-completeness"
    if retrieval_p95_ms <= 0.0 or error_rate < 0.0 or error_rate > 1.0:
        return False, error_rate, "service-signal"
    if content_logged:
        return False, error_rate, "sensitive-telemetry"
    if not rollback_ready:
        return False, error_rate, "recovery-readiness"
    assert trace_stages == expected_stages
    return True, round(retrieval_p95_ms, 2), "redacted-stage-trace"

steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Rag Quality Drift Detection: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory RAG engineering team handles case 9115 during a regulated document deletion request. Build deterministic Python evidence to trace every RAG stage with bounded redacted signals, SLOs, causal faults, and rollback readiness; record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Monitor corpus, query, language, embedding, score, filter, feedback, answerability, citation, latency, and cost drift with labeled confirmation.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Quality Drift Detection model · Theory Rag Quality Drift Detection.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Quality Drift Detection model · Theory Rag Quality Drift Detection, keep Rag Quality Drift Detection connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Monitor corpus, query, language, embedding, score, filter, feedback, answerability, citation, latency, and cost drift with labeled confirmation.

hints: For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Quality Drift Detection model · Theory Rag Quality Drift Detection, name the stakeholder, corpus, source, document, chunk, model, index, query, relevance, tenant, context, citation, evaluation, and transfer boundary, Rag Quality Drift Detection precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RAG and Python Defend the Rag Quality Drift Detection model · Theory Rag Quality Drift Detection, trace this concrete input and predict ingestion, normalization, retrieval, filter, fusion, reranking, context, claim, citation, abstention, latency, cost, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A theory RAG engineering team handles case 9115 during a regulated document deletion request. Build deterministic Python evidence to trace every RAG stage with bounded redacted signals, SLOs, causal faults, and rollback readiness; record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Monitor corpus, query, language, embedding, score, filter, feedback, answerability, citation, latency, and cost drift with labeled confirmation.

For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Quality Drift Detection model · Theory Rag Quality Drift Detection, challenge the documented misconception with changed-query, changed-corpus, relevance, retrieval, grounding, citation, adversarial, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native or production-transfer evidence: A change in average vector distance proves semantic quality drift.
